mapper.sql: m.oom_id, m.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, m.rprt_yr, m.er_id, m.vr_id, m.oom_st_cd, m.oom_rslt_cd, m.inspn_dt, m.inspctr_user_id, m.use_bgng_dt, m.use_end_dt, m.frst_reg_dt, m.frst_reg_user_id, m.last_chg_dt, m.last_chg_user_id
FROM er.tn_oom_check m JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = m.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN m.use_bgng_dt AND m.use_end_dt

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = m.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = m.rprt_yr AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(oom_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM er.tn_oom_check WHERE oom_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(oom_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_oom_check (oom_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, er_id, vr_id, oom_st_cd, oom_rslt_cd, inspn_dt, inspctr_user_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{oomId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, #{erId}, #{vrId}, 'INPRG', NULL, NULL, #{inspctrUserId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_oom_check SET er_id = #{erId}, vr_id = #{vrId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND oom_st_cd = 'INPRG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_oom_check SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND oom_st_cd = 'INPRG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_oom_check SET oom_st_cd = 'DONE', oom_rslt_cd = #{rsltCd}, inspn_dt = CURRENT_DATE, inspctr_user_id = #{inspctrUserId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND oom_st_cd = 'INPRG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
UPDATE er.tn_oom_check SET oom_rslt_cd = 'HOLD', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND oom_st_cd = 'INPRG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
